impact: Basejump's tsconfig doesn't exclude `supabase/**`, so Next.js's type checker attempts to compile edge functions that use Deno URL imports (https://deno.land/...). Fails hard. Blocks `npm run build` end-to-end. Fix is one line in tsconfig.exclude. Was masked by stale .next cache before T-001. Not caused by T-001 changes.
resolution: Al opgelost: tsconfig.json bevat `"exclude": ["node_modules", "supabase/functions/**"]` — Deno edge functions worden nu netjes uitgesloten. `npx tsc --noEmit` passeert clean. Marker gesloten 2026-07-04.
title: tsconfig includes Supabase edge functions (Deno) causing Next.js build to fail
